s: An app to help you capture thoughts & ideas
d: Moe Memos is an app to help you capture thoughts and ideas. You can use Moe Memos with either a self-hosted Memos server or locally on your device. Features: - Write memos like tweeting to yourself - Use Moe Memos locally on your device (with export) or sync with your own Memos server - Offline-first experience with automatic sync when you are back online - Material You design with dynamic themes and themed icon - Rich memo content: Markdown editor and renderer, images, non-image attachments, and to-do items - Organize and find memos with tags, pinning, and search - Home screen widget and share sheet integration (text, images, and webpages) - View your memo activity with a progress graph - Full privacy protection, no data collection
